# Datasets

```{python}
import altair as alt
from vega_datasets import data
import pandas as pd
```

```{python}
donations = pd.read_csv('/home/esteban/Documentos/donaciones.txt', parse_dates = ['date'])
donations.head()
```

# Gráfico Lineal
```{python}
alt.Chart(donations).mark_line().encode(
    alt.X('date'),
    alt.Y('sum')
).interactive()
```

# Gráfico de barras
```{python}
top_day = donations.groupby('week_day')['sum'].sum().idxmax()
alt.Chart(donations).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('sum(sum)'),
    alt.Y('week_day', sort = 'x'),
    color = alt.condition(alt.datum.week_day == top_day,
                        alt.value('coral'),
                        alt.value('steelblue'))
).interactive()
```
